zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Radcliffe於1210年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親Adam de Radcliffe22歲，母親Joan de Curwen20歲。他於1240年與Amabil de Trafford在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1290年在英國藍卡爾托廷頓享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Radcliffe于1210年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲Adam de Radcliffe22岁，母亲Joan de Curwen20岁。他于1240年与Amabil de Trafford在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1290年在英国藍卡爾托廷頓享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Radcliffe was born in 1210, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Radcliffe, was 22 and his mother, Joan de Curwen, was 20. He married Amabil de Trafford in 1240, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1290, in Tottington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Radcliffe est né en 1210, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Radcliffe, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan de Curwen, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Amabil de Trafford en 1240, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1290, à Tottington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Radcliffe 1210 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam de Radcliffe 22 und seine Mutter Joan de Curwen 20. Er hat 1240 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Amabil de Trafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1290 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tottington, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Radcliffe è nato il nel 1210 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Adam de Radcliffe, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Curwen, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Amabil de Trafford nel 1240, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1290, nel Tottington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Radcliffeが1210年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Adam de Radcliffeは22歳，母Joan de Curwenは20歳であった。1240年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAmabil de Traffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1290年にイギリスランカシュアイアトッティントンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Radcliffe(이)가 1210년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Radcliffe(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Curwen(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Amabil de Trafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1290년 영국 랭카실르 토틴그턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Radcliffe nasceu em 1210, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Radcliffe, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Curwen, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Amabil de Trafford em 1240, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1290, em Tottington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Radcliffe родился в 1210 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Adam de Radcliffe было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Curwen, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Amabil de Trafford в 1240 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1290 г. в местности тоттингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Radcliffe nació en 1210, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Radcliffe, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan de Curwen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Amabil de Trafford en 1240, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1290, en Tottington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años.
